str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - unfamiliar-terminology
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: Overcoming the Challenges of Understanding Complex Algorithms
entry.summary: As technology continues to advance, algorithms have become an integral part of our everyday lives. From search engines and social media platforms to medical diagnostics and financial trading systems, algorithms are used in various fields to solve complex problems. However, understanding these algorithms can be a daunting task for many people, as they often involve intricate mathematical calculations, unfamiliar terminology, and abstract concepts.
